economic_notes: Nanoose First Nation has related party relationships with Nanoose Economic Development Master Limited Partnership, Snaw-naw-as Market Limited Partnership (gas station), Snaw-naw-as Investment Limited Partnership, and Snaw-naw-as Forest Services Limited Partnership. A guarantee of $4,600,000 was provided for the gas station construction loan, with a balance of $4,069,583 at year end. Contaminated sites review underway.
notes: Only partial notes pages were provided (notes 17-19 only). No financial statements, income statement, balance sheet, or schedules were included. Nanoose First Nation is located in BC (Snaw-naw-as). Contingent liability of $4,069,583 remaining on a $4,600,000 bank guarantee for Snaw-naw-as Market Limited Partnership gas station. Contaminated sites assessment underway with unknown liability. Property taxes of $106,934 assessed to Nanoose Economic Development Master Limited Partnership. Consulting fees paid to related partnerships totalling $203,600.
